task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If isPngDataUrl allows SVG, React PDF Image throws during renderToBuffer.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundation for all PDF output; toWelderName and isPngDataUrl cover adversarial cases; clear file path and layout.

task_scores.task_title: Create API route with validation and body size limit (Step 2.1)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If chartDataUrl validation fails to reject non-PNG, renderToBuffer can throw with an unclear React PDF error.
task_scores.reasoning: Core PDF pipeline; chunked/411 and body-size checks reduce OOM risk; depends on 1.2 and 1.3.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If getApiBase is wrong when basePath is set, fetch URL is wrong and downloads return 404 in production.
task_scores.reasoning: Completes user flow; getApiBase extraction improves testability; basePath caveat documented.

critical_issues: Step 4.6 413 test allocates ~5MB; on low-memory CI this can OOM and cause flaky failures.
getApiBase unit test in Node always returns empty string; basePath branch is never covered, so tests can pass while basePath prod fetch fails.
minor_issues: Phase 2–3 verification relies on curl and manual dev-server checks.
411 chunked test may be ineffective if curl sends Content-Length anyway.
suggestions: Run getApiBase tests in jsdom so basePath branches execute, or document that Pre-Flight curl is required for basePath verification.
Add CI conditional to Step 4.6 (e.g. skip 413 or use smaller PAD_SIZE when process.env.CI and low RAM).
dependency_order: 1.2 before 2.1 (route needs WelderReportPDF), 2.1 before 3.3 (handleDownloadPDF needs working API). 1.1 before 1.2.
premortem_top_risk: html-to-image fails on Recharts in target browser, chartDataUrl is null, PDF ships without chart, and users treat it as a broken export.
goal_alignment_notes: Plan directly supports the goal: supervisors and welders can export welder reports as PDFs. Phase order, validation, and test coverage are aligned. Chart capture is best-effort and documented.
